rationale: The cited study directly examines how introducing economy/premium private-label tiers changes brand choice and private-label vs national-brand shares, which closely overlaps with the citing paper’s focus on private-label competition and simulations of new private-label introductions. Both are scanner-data brand-choice studies in grocery categories centered on private-label dynamics, making this plausibly a substantive prior empirical/comparison source rather than an incidental mention.
